noSessions: No sessions yet. Create one to start chatting with your data.
selectSession: Select a session or start a new one.
getStartedDesc: Ask your AI assistant about your data. Try one of these:

prompts.revenue: What was our revenue last month?
prompts.trends: Show me the top trends in our data
prompts.insights: What are the key insights from this dataset?
prompts.forecast: What is the forecast for next quarter?
prompts.anomalies: What anomalies or issues should I know about?

messagePlaceholder: Ask a question or request an action.

errors.createSession: Unable to create chat session. Ensure the selected agent is valid.
errors.timeout: Luna is taking longer than expected. Please try again in a moment.
errors.connection: Luna is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a couple of minutes.
errors.generic: Something went wrong sending your message. Please try again.

platformSafetyBlock.title: Platform policy refusal
platformSafetyBlock.subtitle: This message was refused by the platform safety floor
platformSafetyBlock.mistake: If you believe this is a mistake, contact platform support.
